caption: 陪挑了三小时。
scene: Andy standing on the boutique floor in good shoes beside a low pedestal with two small handbag shapes on it, the headset line on his ear, one paw held out mid-gesture toward a small departing customer figure, a tiny clock on the wall showing three hours passed, his mouth a flat drained line.
bible_hook: §2.6B 帮客人挑了三小时,最后人家说"我再看看"
rationale: Recent Andy posts were tired/target-hit/scanning; this pulls a fresh store-manager frustration (the no-sale after long service) not yet used, holding the pressure with quiet restraint.
